---
title: "`r params$title`"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
params:
  title: "Tree Maintenance Assignments"
  assignment_name: "my_assignment"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-layout-row { column-gap: 2em; }
</style>
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source(here::here('Trees/AssignPeopleToTrees.R'))
assigned = load_assignments(params$assignment_name)
```

```{r}
#| label: display
#| layout: [[45, 55]]
summarize_assignments(assigned, people, params$title)
show_assignments(assigned, people)
```
